notes: Requires Mobs Combat. An undetected knife stealth strike deals 2.0x damage at level I, 2.25x at level II, and 2.5x at level III. The first hit alerts the target, so subsequent hits are ordinary attacks until the player escapes and approaches unseen again.
The outer-reach check measures from the player's eye to the nearest point of the target's hitbox. Valid strikes emit sharp critical sparks.
Requires MoreWeapons. Drawn Steel increases the damage of a fully charged base Iaijutsu strike; it does not unlock or control the stance. Drawn Steel cannot combine with Perfect Strike.
Requires Mobs Combat. The first attack during a server-confirmed parry counter window consumes the reversal; only a fully charged attack receives its health and posture bonuses.
Power rows are roll power before gold, essence, book, or Apothic quanta changes.
Cycle mining modes with the Vein Miner keybind after applying it.
The stored charge is consumed by the next successful direct melee hit. Removing the helmet, dying, or logging out clears the charge.
